lines.speaker: Dock worker
lines.text: We could always do with an extra pair of hands on the dock. See Frankie, the fresh fish trader, if you're looking for work.

sections.title: When working on a broken fishing crane

lines.speaker: Dock worker
lines.text: We can fix this faster if we work together!

lines.speaker: Dock worker
lines.text: Can I get some assistance over here?

sections.title: When a fishing crane has been successfully repaired

lines.speaker: Dock worker
lines.text: Great work, this crane should be good for a while!
